name: Grilled Pineapple
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pineapple crosswise into six 3/4-inch-thick slices.
2. Stir together the butter, brown sugar, and curry powder in a small bowl.
3. Grill the pineapple slices on an uncovered grill directly over medium coals for 6 to 8 minutes, turning once and brushing with the butter mixture once or twice until heated through.
4. In a separate small bowl, combine the yogurt and toasted coconut.
5. To serve, cut each pineapple slice in half.
6. Serve warm with the yogurt.
